name: Vislink Technologies, Inc.
business: Vislink Technologies, Inc. is a global technology business that provides RF and 5G solutions for collecting, delivering, and managing live video and associated data for the broadcast, surveillance, and defense markets. The company also offers professional and technical services, including AI-driven automated production.

exposures.sentence: We also provide solutions utilizing AI (Artificial Intelligence) technologies to provide automated news and sporting events coverage.

We provide RF and 5G solutions for collecting live news, sports, entertainment, and news events for the broadcast, surveillance, and defense markets with real-time video intelligence using a range of transmission products.
We have developed high-quality RF and 5G solutions to meet surveillance and defense markets operational and industry challenges based on our knowledge of live video delivery.
the ability to contribute video over bonded cellular (3G, 4G, 5G) satellite fiber emerging networks, including Starlink

catalysts.event: Voluntary delisting from Nasdaq and listing on OTCQB
catalysts.sentence: On February 10, 2025, we filed a Form 25 with the Securities and Exchange Commission (the SEC) to voluntarily delist our common stock from The Nasdaq Capital Market.

tamClaims.claim: Live internet video traffic makes up 82.5% of global internet traffic in 2023.
tamClaims.sentence: live internet video traffic continues to surge, making up 82.5% of global internet traffic in 2023.

tamClaims.claim: Nearly 30% of internet users watch live streams weekly.
tamClaims.sentence: Nearly 30% of internet users watch live streams weekly, and live video is projected to account for 25% of total traffic in 2025

tamClaims.claim: Live video is projected to account for 25% of total traffic in 2025.
tamClaims.sentence: live video is projected to account for 25% of total traffic in 2025
